mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 220 in the CPIAUCSL index signals central bank inaction, leading to elevated real interest rates and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite inflationary signal, or CPIAUCSL fails to predict 20d returns with Rank IC > 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in PAYEMS and decline in UNRATE signal tight labor markets, increasing corporate pricing power and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction effect between PAYEMS and UNRATE fails to explain SPX returns (p > 0.10 in regression), or 20d returns show negative correlation with labor market strength.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) combined with strong housing starts (HOUST) indicates robust demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction effect between INDPRO and HOUST fails to predict SPX returns (p > 0.10 in regression), or 60d returns show negative correlation with demand indicators.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in INDPRO signals stronger industrial output, reducing supply-side constraints and boosting corporate earnings, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5d forward returns show no significant correlation with INDPRO changes (Rank IC < 0.02), or industrial production fails to predict SPX returns in 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Strong consumer demand, measured by RSAFS, predicts elevated corporate revenues and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns show negative correlation with RSAFS (Rank IC < -0.03), or RSAFS fails to predict SPX returns in 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in UNRATE signals tighter labor markets, increasing wage pressures and corporate costs, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns show positive correlation with UNRATE declines (Rank IC > 0.03), or unemployment rate fails to predict SPX returns in 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rising GDP (GDPC1) combined with strong housing starts (HOUST) indicates robust demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction effect between GDPC1 and HOUST fails to predict SPX returns (p > 0.10 in regression), or 60d returns show negative correlation with demand indicators.
